titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Mustapha Khayati Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 03:30

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Materials in French, Arabic, Persian, and English.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, printed material, and other papers by or relating to Mustapha Khayati. Portions of the collection are in French and Arabic.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Mustapha Khayati Papers. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

bioghist.head: Mustapha Khayati
bioghist.p: Mustapha Khayati is a Tunisian political activist and historian of culture. A member of the Situationist International between 1965 and 1969, he authored the tract On Student Misery (1966), which became a key text for the student protest movement at the University of Strasbourg in France.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Christie's on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2015.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Mustapha Khayati Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into thirty-two series: I. Guy Debord papers, 1964-1970. II. Course notes from the University of Strasbourg, 1962-1964. III. René Viénet papers, 1966-1970. IV. René Riesel papers, 1968-1998. V. Strasbourg material by Debord, Joubert, Schneider, and others, 1962-1967. VI. Papers relating to the Garnaultins, 1965-1967. VII. Situationist correspondence, circa 1965-1969. VIII. British International Situationist papers, 1966-1968. IX. American International Situationist papers, 1967-1969. X. Papers from the Counseil de Nantes, 1968-1970. XI. Texts and polemics of various ultra-left groups, circa 1972-1973. XII. Italian materials from before the forming of Italian International Situationists, 1966-1972. XIII. Raoul Vaneigem papers, circa 1972. XIV. Internationale Anarchiste papers, circa 1971-1976. XV. Pro- and post- Situationist publications, 2001-2004. XVI. Anarchist publications, 1946-1973. XVII. Arthur Lehning papers, circa 1918-1971. XVIII. Writings by Khayati and related materials, circa 1967-1979. XIX. Lafif Lakhdar papers, 1973-1978. XX. Sultat-al-Majalis papers, 1974-1975. XXI. Revolutionary Israeli publications, 1968-1976. XXII. Shimon Ballas and V Hu Aher writings, 2007. XXIII. French Trotskyite Publications on the Middle East, 1970-1975. XXIV. Arabic publications, 1966-1999. XXV. Materials from related Palestinian movements, 1967-1974. XXVI. Kurdish and Iranian publications published in France, 1965-1979. XXVII. Moroccan publications, 1963-1991. XXVIII. Algeria publications, 1967-1989. XXIX. Materials relating to the Tunisian Students Union in Strasbourg, 1962-1965. XXX. Perspectives (Groupe d'Etudes et d' Action Socialiste Tunisienne) GEAST papers, 1962-1973. XXXI. Papers from Communist groups, 1960-1994. XXXII. Far-left publications, 1950-1991.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and writings that include drafts, notes and manuscripts. Contains correspondence concerning Anton Harstein, Mario Perniola and Branko Vuciovic.

did.unittitle: Course notes from the University of Strasbourg

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Course notes that cover varying subjects including, Marx, H. Lefebvre, urban sociology, philosopy and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: stuff

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence includes letters to Khayati while he was in Amman and an insulting letter to J.P. George. Wrtings include "La revolution inconnue" and the translations "Whither China", intro to Isaacs' Trotsky book and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings include address to Internationale Situationniste, 1968, "La raage au ventre", "Conseil d I'Université: mode d' emploi", "La Grappignole" a song against Doyen Grappin, and others. Also included are Les Enragés comics from 1968.

did.unittitle: Strasbourg material by Debord, Joubert, Schneider, and others

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence includes, a letter from a bookseller refusing to stock Internationale Situationniste, and mailed ephemera. Writings by Debord, Moles, Bertrand, Joubert, Schneider, Wilder, and include "Misère dans le milieu étudiant, "La Torture dans Ia vitrine", and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains posters and the cartoon "Le retour de Ia colonne Durruti" is also included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence includes, letters between Garnault and Khayati and mailed ephemera. Writings by Debord, Khayati, Bernstein, Nicholson-Smith, Vaneigem, Ballivet, Vayr-Piova, Millot, Schneider and include, "La vérité est révolutionaire", "De la merde en milieu situationiste", "Rien que de la merde mais toute la merde", "Souvenirs de Ia maison des mots", and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Posters including "Attention trois provocateurs" and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correpsondence includes, typescript letter from Patrick Manchette, a letter to Jean Maitron and other materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence from individuals and groups in Germany, Belgium, The Netherlands, Scandinavia, Quebec, Italy, Morocco and other locations.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with includes, Gray, Khayati, Bookchin, Morea and others. Writings include "Problems and pseudo-problems conserning 'dangerous drugs', "The Institute of Phenomenological Studies". Also, includes issues of the periodical "King Mob".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two issues of King Mob.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with includes Chasse, Vaneigem and Khayati. Writings by Chasse and Bookchin. Cartoons are also included.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications include "Toward Liberation" by Lewis Herbert; Seattle Group Bullein, numbers 49 and 50; "Resurgence Youth Movement" number, 1; "The Resistance" and others.

did.unittitle: Papers from the Counseil de Nantes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence by Yvon Chotard. Writing by Yvon Chotard with some annotations by Guy Debord include "contribution à l'élaboration d'une ligue syndicaliste à l'UNEF","Addresse au comités d'Action", and a pamphlet titled " Petite encyclopédie des latrines contemporaines. Tome supplémentaire: Histoire du conseil de Nantes". Also includes the comic,"Rapport du Bureau National de l'UNEF sur le 57eme Congres de Marseille".

did.unittitle: Texts and polemics of various ultra-left groups

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes pre-publication typescript copy of "L 'ldéologie ultra-gauche", by J. Barrot and, "Chansons révolutionnaired du Vénézuela, translated by Eduardo Rothe. Also includes the pamphlets, Anti groups, Le GRCA (suite et fin), Comité d'Action Clandestine, Sabatage de la flamme Olympique and other materials.

did.unittitle: Italian materials from before the forming of Italian International Situationists

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence of Khayati, Debord, Passerini, Permiola and Salvatori. Writings include two pamphlets, "Puento Explosione' and Khayati's translation of "Contribution servantà rectifier...".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings include, Preface to the selected works of Coeurderoy, a screen play on the Spanish Civil War, plan for a film on Durruti and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings include "Philosophie dans un preau d'ecole" by Guy Bodson; two typescripts, and a false currency note issued by the 'Cantre banque utopiste' from Ynes Renaud; "Vieux monde", letter addressed to the paper Le Monde and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "Les mauvais jours finiront", and "L'abime: revue de critique sociale".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes issues of "Front libertaire" and "Action directe". Included are the pamphlets "Du syndicalisme révolutionnaire à la révolution", "L'anarchie et le problème de l'organisation", and "Statuts de la Confédération nationale du Travail" and other materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains L'Hydre de LERNE issues 2,3 and 6. Also include are May 1st writings Pour un pratique anarachiste intemationale, Mouvement de solidarité internationale and other materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications includes Lehning of prints of Bakunin's conceptions of Revolutionary Organisations and their Role, and Anarchisme et Bolchevisme. Also include is correspondence with Khayati and additional printed materials.

did.unittitle: Writings by Khayati and related materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings by Khayati with some notes and annotations by Debord and a few instances of correspondence. Writings include De la misere en milieu etudiant', 'Contribution servant a rectifier l'opinion du public sur la revolution dans les pays sous-developpes', plan for a book on revolution in thrid-world countries,'Les mots captifs', translation into English of A. Eble (unpublished), drafts towards a Situationist dictionary, i.e. various words to be defined.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter of resignation, submitted at the Venice Conference in 1986, and his notes on the agenda of the Conference. Notes and draft opening for 'Gloses marginales à la définition minimum sur!'organisation révolutionnaire'; notes on the proletariat, its organisation, its modus operandi; manuscript and typescript, his translation into Arabic of a tract by the Comité d' Action Maghébin, originally edited by Khayati and an Algerian comrade;translation into French of 'En attendant un masacre', the text originally drafted in Arabic by Khayati and Lafif Lakhdar ahead of Black September, 1970; translation of the manifesto 'Tout le pouvoir aux conseils', published in Sultatal-Majlis'.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 'Aliénation' and 'Marxisme', entries for l'Encyclopédie Larousse; 'Les Marxismes', a pamphlet for I 'Encyclopedie du Monde Actuel (30 pp.)includes a copy of the printed pamphlet.

did.unittitle: The Champ Libre re-edition of Misère

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Letter to G. Lebovici opposing the Champ Libre re-edition of Misère; false declaration by Lebovici concerning the re-edition, together with drafts of the same text, and the definitive version of the printed text. Debord [writing as 'Des Proletaires'), printed tract, Foutre, contra Khayati and Vaneigem and in defense of Champ Libre;various drafts and the final version of his response to Lebovici; draft of the text sent to newspapers and others, re the same controversy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Various translations of De la misére en milieu étudiant.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Khayati and Vaneigem, project for an unpublished anthology of anti-religious texts, Le Bon Dieu dans la merde intended to be issued by Champ Libre (1971), wth various copies of selected texts, and manuscript notes by Khayati for a translation of heretical Arabic texts, and 19th-century social democracy and religion. Preface and introduction to La contre-revolution bureaucratique and a copy of the book. List of articles published in various periodicals including Living Marxism, New Essays, International Council Correspondence, et al. Christian Bourgois, letter to Khayati from the published of Editions 10/18, discussing publication ideas proposed by Kostas Papaioannou, philosopher and translator of Marx. Khayati and Christian Labrande, manuscript draft of the introduction to La Premiere Internationale, a collection of texts selected by Khayati, with a copy of the book. Translation to Arabic of L 'ideologiefroide (K. Papaioannou) supervised, revised and presented by K.hayati, Casablanca, 1989, and a copy of the book.Translation to Arabic of Traditional theory and critical theory (M.Horkheimer) supervised, revised and presented by Khayati, Casablanca, 1990, and a copy of the book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Translation into Arabic of Debord 's La Société du spectacle, theses 35-133, does not contain the first chapter and Abdelkader el Janabi, faxed manuscript letter to Khayati, on publication of article on I.S. in Arabic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Khayati [writing as M. al-AhnafJ and Bruno Etienne, /ls ont rase la Mesopotamie; with related texts and news clippings.

did.unittitle: Writings about activities in the Arab lands

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Revolution and reactionary groups in the Arab lands, written for the radical wing of Moroccan students, A polemic with the Tunisian group 'Perspectives' on the Palestinian question, and another, 'Revolution Arabe et Palestine'. 'Misère des Etudes arabes', for An-Nidhal, the Tunisian revolutionary periodical, contra Lutfallah Soliman, and another on the same, in Arabic. Manuscript in Arabic, for an article on revolutionary organisation with a critique of the FDPLP. Manuscript in Arabic, notes for an unpublished project on Rosa Luxemburg. notes for a film project on the Babek revolt, a heretical movement against the Abbasid rule. A Pamphlet, 'La question Palestinienne du nationalisme au marxisme', and a periodical, An-Nidhal, no. 2

did.unittitle: Critique et autocritique de la Resistance en Palestine

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Full corrected typescript with manuscript introduction for the unpublished book Critique et autocritique de la Resistance en Palestine, rejected by Editions de Minuit and its owner Jerome Lindon, who found it 'too extreme'. Notes on various Palestinian and Arab groups, and their chiefs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Manuscript and correspondence to Khayati along with periodicals printed in arabic. Titles include, Le Manifeste communiste: premiere traduction arabe nonfalsifiée, La Revolution allemande 1918-1919, Etudes Arabes, and others. Also included are photocopies of articles written by Salah Boulid, friend of Lakhdar and former student ofKhayati, published in Al-Hayat and Al-Quds A/Arabi.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Khayati and Lakhdar editors, Sultat-al-Majalis, no. 1 the sole issue published of this periodical, together with printed proofs, introduction written by Khayati, other writings and correspondence. Writings and correspondence from, Y.M. Hasan, AR. Tylecote, A.Sneij, and a translation of Susan Saxe. Other printed material includes periodical, Correspondance Internationale [in Arabic], no. 1 and a reproduction of 'L 'Insurrection' [in Arabic], an Egyptian clandestine text.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Titles include Israel Imperial News, Israel Imperial News!ISRAC no. l, Middle East for Revolutionary Socialism no. 1, Matzpen 'The Class Nature of Israeli Society', New Left Review, no. 65, ISRAC no. 4, SRAC no. 5, Akiva Orr tract - Draft resistance in Israel, tract - Que celui qui refuse d'opprimer ne soil pas opprime, pamphlet - Rami Livni parle, Paroles d'un militant de !'Alliance Communiste Revolutionnaire [in Arabic], tract - Nous demandons la liberation immediate de nos camarades with another copy in Hebrew. -tract, Declaration de !'Alliance Communiste Revolutionnaire [in Arabic], 1973; with another copy in Hebrew. -tract, A bas !'occupation [in Arabic], 1973. -Revolutionary Communist Alliance, tract, Statement to the Press [in English]. -tract, Declaration commune par Arabes et !sraeliens Revolutionnaire. -Khayati and Lakhdar et al, pamphlet, Adresse aux Proletaires et aux Jeunes Revolutionnaire Arabes et lsraeliens, Paris 1976. -Matzpen and Sultat-al-Majalis, tract against the war of 1973, Contre les illusions nationalistes par ! 'alternative Internationaliste [in French and Arabic], 1973. -Khayati and Eli Lobel, manuscript, Discussion theorique entre Eli Lobel, LafifLakhdar and Mustapha Khayati (23 pp.). -Akiva Orr, manuscript letter to Khayati, I February 1975. -Sultat-al-Majalis, copy typescript letter to Matzpen, 21 December 1973. And others, including: two issues of Monthly Review and Ch 'an nos. 1 and 2 (1972-73); and Clara Halter, Lettre du Comite International Permanent de la Gauche pour la Paix au Moyen Orient a Nayef Hawatmeh, 25 March 1970.

did.unittitle: Shimon Ballas and V Hu Aher writings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Unpublished French translation of his novel V Hu A her (I 991 ), published in English by City Lights as Outcast. This French translation by Muriel Nemerovski os together with a file of press clippings.

did.unittitle: French Trotskyite Publications on the Middle East

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes the pamphlets De la Résistance Palestinienne à la Révolution Socialiste, La Révolution Arabe, and Le Conflit au Mayen Orient. Also includes the periodicals Révolution socialiste arabe no. 1 and Al-Munadil [The Militant], no. 23.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes the periodicals Al-thawra al-arabiyya [Arab Revolution] nos 2-7,Al-tariq [The Path], no.1, The Voice of Workers no. 18, the tracts Sur la liberation de la Palestine, Premier anniversaire de la guerre de Juin 1967 and the pamphlet Thèses pour un programme du mouvement ouvier arabe' [in Arabic].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes the periodicals Al Jazeera al-Jadida [The New Peninsula], nos. 1-4, The Voice of the Arabian Peninsula [in Arabic], no. 1, and the tracts declaration of the Popular Front for the Liberation of Occupied Arabian Gulf (PFLOAG) [in Arabic] and common communique about the talk between the PFLOAG and the National Democratic Front for the Liberation of Oman and the Occupied Gulf.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Included are Al-Raghba al-ibahiya [The Libertarian Desire] no. 1-5 and other materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include, Apropos du 6eme anniversaire de la guerre du 5 Juin 1967, Du Libertinage, Le Point, Hence, Mirth of Oriental Alienation, Point, La Conscience Sacrilège, Poèmes d'alors, Critique de l'architecture, Vers un état policier au Liban, La Femme dans l'histoire arabo-musulmane, Le Voile, Homnesies, Adonis-Hercule-Narcisse hero universel, Les habis neufs d'Adonis, and other materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes L'habit de l'eau, two copies; Quelque chose dans le genre and Arapoetica.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains wrtings by Anwar Kamil, Georges Henein, Ramses Younane, J. Maitron and others. Titles include, Al-Jarad [Locusts] no. 2, Al-kitaba al-Ukhra, nos. 1 and 3, Empire of Surrounding Walls, Hommage à Georges Henein, Fasa'il [Qffehoots], Trois Conferences, Un Benjamin Pèret de derrière les fagots, La Crecelle noire, no. 3 and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains printed material from El-Janabi and his Al-Raghba al-ibahiya and other Arabic printed materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes writings by Guy Ottewell and Michael Adams, G. Chaliand, and others. Periodical titles include Révolution Palestinienne in Arabic 2, 3, 5 and Fateh volume 1, numbers 1, 2, 4. Additional printed titles include, They Claim there is no resistance, Deir Yassin, The Palestinian Resistance Movement in early 1969, Statement by Al-Fateh to the United Nations Assembly, Le Sud-Liban sera le tombeau des agresseurs, and others.

did.unittitle: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials include, La premiere déclaration politique du PFLP [in Arabic], Le PFLP ne permettra pas qu'on sabote sa lutte [in Arabic],Le PFLP salue la clase ouvrière à l'occasion du centenaire de Lénine [in Arabic], A l'occasion du 15 Mai 1970, anniversaire de la chute de la Palestine et de laproclamation de l'Etat d'Israel [in Arabic], La Resistance Palestinienne et ses problèmes [in Arabic], and Al-Hadaf.

did.unittitle: Front Populaire Democratique de Liberation de le Palestine

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings by Khayati include, note on FPDLP [in Arabic], with letter and Communiqué [in English], draft text in order to constitute a Committee of Solidarity with the FPDLP in the UK, January 1970; Legality and Illegality [in Arabic], adapted translation of a 1920 G.Lukacs text to be used by FPDLP militants; letters in Arabic addressed to: (1) LafifLakhdar from Amman, April 1970; (2) Nayef Hawatrneh leader of FPDLP from Paris; texts in Arabic: (1) Salut au peuple Kurde (2p.); (2) Note critique sur la position du FPDLP vis à vis de l 'URSS; Notes critiques sur le FPDLP durant l'année 1970; and translations into French of two chapters from Hawatmeh 1969. Also contains numerous pamphlets, posters and tracts published by the FPDLP and OPLP.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Catalogue of the non-Arabic section of the PLO Research Center Library in Beirut as of 28 February 1970.

did.unittitle: Kurdish and Iranian publications published in France

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Kurdish documents: Comite de Solidarite a la Revolution Kurde (CSRK), tract, Appel aux peuples du Monde [in French]; CSRK, tract, Communique de presse [in French], 1965. Quotes Bakunin; tract, Appel enfaveur des victimes de la guerre du Kurdistan Ira/den [in French], 1966. This works cites the I.S. 'Addresse aux Revolutionnaires'; Parti Democratique Kurde de Gauche en Syrie, pamphlet, Rapport politique et rapport ideologique [in Arabic], 1973; and Programme du parti decide par le 3eme congres [in Arabic], 1973. Iranian documents: Association des Etudiants Iraniens, pamphlet, L 'Iran breve histoire [in French]; Organisation des Combattants du Peuple, pamphlet, 1972; Organisation des Guerilleros Fedayins du Peuple Iranien (OGFPI); Extraits des derniers manifestes politico-militaires; OGFPI, Quelques points de vue apropos des problemes actuels de la Revolution lranienne; Organisation des Moudjahidines de peuple Irani en, vol. 1.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Union Socialiste des Forces Populaires include Appel aux militants de l'USFP [in Arabic] and Le programme [in Arabic]. Photocopied material by Khayati include his Encyclopedie du monde actuel entries Bouabid andMahjoub Ben Seddik. Also include are La Question Palestinienne in French and Arabic, and Publications on the "1963 plot".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Khayati, photocopy of his entry on Mohamed Basri for the Encyclopedie du monde actuel. Other printed materials include, L'Option Revolutionnaire, pamphlet, L 'UNFP, autocritique [in Arabic], L 'Option Revolutionnaire no. 2 (1982) and no. 2 (1984), Al-Watan [La Patrie] 1977 and numbers 1-2 1986.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two pamphlets in Arabic, Rapport d'Orientation and Sur la societe Marocaine et son evolution. One pamplet in French Critique du programme du Parti Communiste Marocain. On copy of the periodical 23 Mars number 1 and two issues of the perodical Anoual.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials include Bulletin number 1 [in Arabic], Ila-1-Amam a son 14eme anniversaire appelle un boycott des elections [in Arabic], Anfas [Souflles] numbers 7-8 [in Arabic], poster Solidarite avec le peuple Marocain en lutte [in French], Meeting international de solidarite [in French], Comite des residents 73-74, and Declaration des exiles politiques apropos des prochaines elections [in Arabic].

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed journals, fliers, and newsletters most relating to opposition of Hassan II.

did.unittitle: Parti Communiste Marocain (PCM), later Parti pour la Libération et le Socialisme

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings by Ali Yata, Aziz Belal and Abdallah Baroudi, that include pamphlets, new letters and open letters to Hassan II.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials include, Union Nationale des Etudiants: Algeriens Bulletin 'Révolution Universite', Parti de la Révolution Socialiste: Le Révolutionaire and Bulletin de liaison. Publications supporting Ben Bella include, Rassemblement Unitaire des Révolutionnaire Courrier d'Algerie, FLN Clandestin, La Charte, Déclaration de la gauche démocratique et socialiste Algérienne and Lettre aux citoyens et citoyennes en Algérie [in Arabic].

did.unittitle: Materials relating to the Tunisian Students Union in Strasbourg

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings include notes for a projected editorial for a newsletter; Apropos du passage d'un technocrate, réflexions critiques; Premisses pour toute nouvelle théorie révolutionnaire; Expose introductif et plan d 'un programme pour le groupe 'Perspectives'; and Projet de règlement interieur (pour groupe Perspectives Strasbourg).

did.unittitle: Perspectives (Groupe d'Etudes et d' Action Socialiste Tunisienne) GEAST papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include Perspectives, L'ouvrier tunisien [in Arabic], the pamphlets Lavoie tunisienne vers le socia/isme, réponse au révisionniste M Harmel, La question palestinienne dans ses rapports avec le développement de la lutte révolutionnaire en Tunisie, Les caractéristiques de la période actuelle de développement en Tunisie, La question agraire et la crise du régime en Tunisie, Face à l'opportunisme de gauche et de droite, and other printed materials on peasant protests and repression.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials include isuues of Espoir étudiant, and the pamphletsLe choix d'une voie avancée de développement, Résolution du VIie congrès du PCT, Pour une nouvelle alternative, Déclaration des Communistes Tunlsiens and other materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Periodicals include Lavoie de peuple in Arabic, Union ouvriere, Al- Hayat, featuring an article by Said Sakkar. Other printed materials include, political declaration in arabic, selected texts from Lavoie du peuple, in Arabic, joint declaration made by Iraqi pro Nasser and Communist groups, in Arabic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials include, Khalid Bakdash, pamphlet against the Syrian-Egyptian union, in Arabic; Periodicals, organ of the Syrian communist party, in Arabic and Voix de la démocratie, in Arabic; tracts, in French: 'Mise au point', against Bakdash, and 'Sur l'économie syrienne', a polemic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications included are copies of Invariance and le fit du temps, number 8.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications included are L'Anti-Mythes, featuring conversations with H. Simon and Daniel Mothé; Révolution Internationale, number 4; Cahiers du Communisme des Conseils, edited by M. Rubel; special issue: Conseifs ouvriers et Utopie Socialiste; Revue Socialiste, with articles by M. Rubel; Pamphlet, Otto Ruhle, 'Le vieux monde et ses fossoyeurs dans la revolution allemande'. Also included is a typescript, Anton Ciliga, 'Quelques réflexions sur la crise polonaise actuelle'.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Publications and other materials included are, le Brise-glace, Mordicus, la Taupe Bretonne, la mauvaise herbe, l'Assomoir, and Solidarity, a group of publications including: Pamphlet, Vietnam; Hungary 56, a tract by Andy Anderson; Trotsky Revisited, an illustrated tract.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials included are, Programme Communiste, Cahiers rouges, Quatrieme Internationale, Pamphlet by M. Berard Rupture titled avec Lutte Ouvriere et le Trostkysme, and a tract titled la question parlementaire dons !'Internationale Communiste.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include, Socialisme ou Barbarie; Informations, Correspondances Ouvrières; Supplement to ICO n.101, 'Fondements de l'economie communiste', a translation of German texts, with introduction by P. Mattick; ICO, la grève générale en France; ICO, Tentative du Bilan du comité de gréve Renault; Capitalisme et lutte de classes en Pologne 1970-1971.
